name: Uninsured for AI malpractice, options?
description: Self-pay or settle; get coverage ASAP.[1]

acceptedAnswer.text: Self-pay or settle; get coverage ASAP.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Self-fund defense, seek pro bono ethics aid, or settle claims. Levidow firm hit jointly.[1] Key factors: assets, harm extent. Buy tail coverage now. Mitigate via compliance.
